summary: Rough but more listenable version of the concert, making it the preferred release despite its imperfections.
review: The reviewer rates this recording four stars, calling it “the gem” among multiple available versions. While they note the audio is still a rough listen, it is considerably more listenable than the alternatives, suggesting an overall decent performance even if the technical quality isn’t pristine.

ai_rating.rationale: Only one review; reviewer praises the show as a standout version (positive) but mentions rough audio, leading to an overall rating just below four stars.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Audio described as a 'rough listen' yet more listenable than other posted versions; likely lacks clarity and balance of a clean soundboard.

show_quality.setlist_flow: No specific comments on set structure; reviewer simply labels the overall show as a gem compared to other releases.
